Rule.name: RME_Bulk_Request_Batch_Request_Summary
Rule.Description: This rule will return bulk upload summary data for csv file

Argument.name: roleId
Argument.Description: Role Id that is involved in the batch request, this could be null, if no role found with given role name or creating a new role

Argument.name: roleName
Argument.Description: Role Name that is involved in the batch request.

Argument.name: record
Argument.Description: the batch record, whole line of the role that is being created or updated

Argument.name: status
Argument.Description: Status of the role create/update request

Argument.name: context
Argument.Description: A sailpoint.api.SailPointContext object that can be used to query the database if necessary.

Argument.name: file data
Argument.Description: For a role with old and new attribute values
